Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-25680 affecting package cloud-provider-kubevirt for versions less than 0.5.1-5
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-25680 affecting package cloud-provider-kubevirt for versions less than 0.5.1-5. A patched version of the package is available.

Criterion.Comment: Package cloud-provider-kubevirt is earlier than 0.5.1-5, affected by CVE-2026-25680
